name: Workload-Driven Optimization for On-Device Real-Time Subtitle Translation

description: arXiv:2607.09957v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: This report studies on-device English-to-Traditional-Chinese subtitle translation for Taiwan under short inputs, short outputs, batch-size-one inference, low latency, and privacy constraints. These conditions limit the value of optimizations designed for long-context or high-throughput language-model serving. Starting from LMT-60-0.6B, prelimina...
author: Tsz-To Wong
